items.title: Mamdani’s Utopian Vision Faces Reality
items.description: The socialist superstar is already threatening to hike the property taxes of middle-class New Yorkers.

items.title: America’s Earliest Outdoor Photographs Shown at Hartford’s Wadsworth Atheneum
items.description: Your critic wanted to see this lovely show so much that he put his contempt for the museum’s trustees in abeyance for a day.

items.title: In Politics, Social Media Has Supplanted Experience
items.description: The clip is the product. Governance is incidental.

items.title: Pharma Ad Scrutiny a Test for Free Speech
items.description: Don’t let Washington decide what Americans are allowed to hear.

items.title: Sue-Pervised Retirement
items.description: Rampant litigation against 401(k) sponsors is narrowing employees’ investment choices and eroding their retirement wealth.
